body_excerpt: In dhd_prot_ioctcmplt_process of dhd_msgbuf.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to improper input validation. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In dhd_prot_ioctcmplt_process of dhd_msgbuf.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to improper input validation. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileg
